title: What are the quality key performance indicators, and how do they work?
bodyHtml:
Around 60% of Back Market customers are not only new to Back Market but also refurbished tech. That’s why ensuring a frictionless customer experience is the best way to convince new customers to permanently switch to using renewed devices.

A disappointing customer experience may cause them to go back to buying new tech.  
 
Our goal is to give our customers no factual reasons to buy new by ensuring a perfect customer journey at all levels. 

We also aim to improve our quality processes. This is why beginning of October 2023, we have launched fairer quality processes called sales suspensions to replace monitoring and last-chance periods.
 
To ensure the process is fair, we follow these 5 metrics: 
 

  • Defective Rate (over 90 days): This metric represents the level of contacts linked to the functionality of the item and accessories ordered and delivered in the last 90 days. It impacts your ability to win BackBoxes and may lead to a 30-day sales suspension at a device model level if you’re among the lowest performing sellers.  

 

  • Appearance Rate (over 30 days): This metric represents the contacts linked to your customers’ dissatisfaction with the appearance of the items delivered in the last 30 days. It impacts your ability to win BackBoxes and may lead to a 7-day sales suspension at an item category level if you’re among the lowest performing sellers.  

 

  • On-Time Delivery Rate (over 30 days) / On-Time Shipping Rate: These 2 metrics have been bundled together in a Shipping & Delivery rates block. These metrics represent the number of orders  that were properly tracked and delivered on time / shipped on time in the last 30 days.  It impacts your ability to win BackBoxes and may lead to a 7-day sales suspension at a market level if you’re among the lowest performing sellers.  

 

  • Order Cancellation Rate (over 7 days): This metric represents the number of orders placed that were cancelled by you in the last 7 days. It impacts your ability to win BackBoxes and, in case of a significant increase of orders cancelled by you within a short period of time, Back Market reserves the right to suspend your account until we receive clarification and a solution for your situation. 

 

  • Wrong Item Rate (over 30 days): This metric reflects the customer contacts linked to wrong items received, including incompatible accessories, for orders delivered in the last 30 days. It impacts your ability to win BackBoxes.

 

To check out your quality key performance indicators, log into your Back Office > "Insights" > "Quality".

For more information, check out the Back Market Quality Charter. Or read this article on how the new quality processes will affect your business.
